// ConnectionStrings: TESTING profile for the integration suite. Points at the same throwaway local/CI Postgres the dev profile uses (port 5544). This is NOT a production secret — it is the identical disposable credential appsettings.Development.json already commits, and CI overrides it with a service container on the same port. Real environments override ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection out-of-band.
// Jwt: Throwaway signing key for the test host only (>= 32 chars for HMAC-SHA256). Never used outside testing.
